hats.name: Cowboy Hat
hats.description: The leather is old and cracked, but surprisingly supple. It smells musty.

hats.name: Bowler Hat
hats.description: Made from smooth felt.

hats.name: Top Hat
hats.description: A gentleman's classic.

hats.name: Sombrero
hats.description: A festively decorated hat made from woven straw.

hats.name: Straw Hat
hats.description: Light and cool, it's a farmer's delight.

hats.name: Official Cap
hats.description: Looks like it belonged to a postman or policeman. Either way, it's still very soft and smells okay.

hats.name: Blue Bonnet
hats.description: Harken back to simpler times with this prairie bonnet.

hats.name: Plum Chapeau
hats.description: Looks alright.

hats.name: Skeleton Mask
hats.description: The red eyes are glowing mysteriously.

hats.name: Goblin Mask
hats.description: Freak out the neighborhood with this creepy mask. Rubber ear joints for effect.

hats.name: Chicken Mask
hats.description: You'll be sure to get them grinning with this one.

hats.name: Earmuffs
hats.description: Keep your ears toasty. Lined with artisanal velvet from Castle Village.

hats.name: Delicate Bow
hats.description: Little pink jewels glisten as you examine it.

hats.name: Tropiclip
hats.description: It's shaped like a little palm tree.

hats.name: Butterfly Bow
hats.description: This one is very soft.

hats.name: Hunter's Cap
hats.description: The wool lining should stay warm deep into the forest.

hats.name: Trucker Hat
hats.description: Mesh in the back to keep your head cool.

hats.name: Sailor's Cap
hats.description: It's fresh and starchy.

hats.name: Good Ol' Cap
hats.description: A floppy old topper with a creased bill. Looks like it's been through a lot.

hats.name: Fedora
hats.description: A city-slicker's standard.

hats.name: Cool Cap
hats.description: It looks really faded, but it used to be a vibrant blue.

hats.name: Lucky Bow
hats.description: The middle is made of solid gold.

hats.name: Polka Bow
hats.description: This one's sure to be turn heads.

hats.name: Gnome's Cap
hats.description: This gnome had a very large head.

hats.name: Eye Patch
hats.description: You can't tell if it's real or just from a costume shop.

hats.name: Santa Hat
hats.description: Celebrate the magical season.

hats.name: Tiara
hats.description: This one has a big amethyst encircled by gold.

hats.name: Hard Hat
hats.description: Keep your dome in one piece.

hats.name: Sou'wester
hats.description: The shape helps to keep sailors dry during storms.

hats.name: Daisy
hats.description: A fresh spring daisy to put in your hair.

hats.name: Watermelon Band
hats.description: The color scheme was inspired by the beloved summer melon.

hats.name: Mouse Ears
hats.description: Made from synthetic fibers.

hats.name: Cat Ears
hats.description: Whiskers included.

hats.name: Cowgal Hat
hats.description: The band is studded with fake diamonds.

hats.name: Cowpoke Hat
hats.description: For dairy experts.

hats.name: Archer's Cap
hats.description: Fashionable whether you're an archer or not.

hats.name: Panda Hat
hats.description: A lovely panda hat.

hats.name: Blue Cowboy Hat

hats.name: Red Cowboy Hat
hats.description: An eye-catching cowboy hat in red suede.

hats.name: Cone Hat
hats.description: A curiosity from a distant land.

hats.name: Living Hat
hats.description: It absorbs moisture from your scalp. No watering needed!

hats.name: Mushroom Cap

hats.name: Dinosaur Hat
hats.description: A hat fashioned to look like a small dinosaur.

hats.name: Totem Mask

hats.name: Logo Cap

hats.name: Wearable Dwarf Helm
hats.description: A slightly larger, human sized version of the helmets worn by dwarves.

hats.name: Blobfish Mask
